_meta.keyKnowledge: We select and use the right digital tools to create, find and share content, following common conventions.

_source.w: We select and use the right digital tools to create, find and share content, following common conventions.
y: Choosing the right tool for each task makes us more efficient and effective.
Following digital conventions ensures our work is professional and accessible.
These skills prepare us for the digital demands of further study and future careers.
eg: We choose the best tool for our task — word processor, presentation, spreadsheet or design app.
We apply formatting conventions — headings, captions, citations — to our digital work.
We use advanced search techniques to find reliable information online.
We create content that follows accessibility standards like alt text and clear contrast.
We select appropriate file formats for different purposes — PDF for sharing, editable for collaboration.
We manage our digital files with a logical folder structure and naming convention.
